agent_card.name: AgentBin Spec Agent
agent_card.description: A2A v1.0 spec compliance test agent. Exercises all interaction patterns for client validation.

skills.name: Message Only
skills.description: Stateless message send/receive — no task created.

skills.name: Task Lifecycle
skills.description: Full task state machine: submitted → working → completed with artifact.

skills.name: Task Failure
skills.description: Task that transitions to failed state with error message.

skills.name: Task Cancel
skills.description: Task that stays working and waits to be canceled via tasks/cancel.

skills.name: Multi-Turn
skills.description: Multi-turn conversation using input-required state. Say 'done' to complete.

skills.name: Streaming
skills.description: Streams multiple status updates and artifact chunks via SSE.

skills.name: Long Running
skills.description: Simulates a long-running task with periodic status updates over ~10 seconds.

skills.name: Data Types
skills.description: Returns mixed content: text, structured JSON, file (SVG), and multi-part artifacts.

httpAuthSecurityScheme.description: Bearer token authentication. Use token: agentbin-test-token
